title: goldfussia ovatibracteata
intro: Goldfussia ovatibracteata, also known as the Blue Dasher or Blue Mountain Goldfussia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goldfussia ovatibracteata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Goldfussia ovatibracteata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
